name: dac-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for the ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC), the premier electronic-design-automation and chip-design venue: routing between the double-blind archival Research Manuscript track and the industry-facing Engineering Track, the two-stage abstract-then-manuscript submission on Softconf, the 6+1-page ACM double-column budget, QoR/PPA evidence on EDA benchmark suites (ISPD, EPFL, OpenROAD, ISCAS/ITC, TAU, CircuitNet), ML-for-EDA and hardware-security topic lanes, and the ACM Digital Library camera-ready. Grounded in the live DAC 2026 (63rd) call, dac.com, IEEE CEDA, ACM SIGDA, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
